Name: sa
Text: Today at work, they brought in pizzas to celebrate a coworker's birthday. After we ate them, an angry customer called us about a program that wasn't working.

Name: sa
Text: Last night I was with my boyfriend; it was a nice evening, even though I cried.

Name: sa
Text: It was my boyfriend's birthday, and we celebrated at my grandfather's house with all our friends. The gift from his brother left me speechless.

Name: sa
Text: After a long time, I ran into an old friend I hadn't seen since high school. She told me stories that made me angry but at the same time really shook me up.

Name: sa
Text: This morning I had breakfast; everything was fine until I had to go to work.

Name: sa
Text: Yesterday afternoon at work, they complimented me on a project I had done for a company that had contacted them for feedback. I was very excited.

Name: sa
Text: I love to eat, but if you offer me rare meat, I might get sick

Name: sa
Text: For my boyfriend's birthday, I made tiramisu—it was really good. It was very hot that day, and I sweated a lot.

Name: sa
Text: I don't have anything to do at work today, and on top of that, the internet isn't working.

Name: sa
Text: I've been feeling really sad lately because I have to move to a new city, and the thought of starting all over again really scares me.
